TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_sula‚Äô, title = sula‚Äô, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/sula‚Äô} }

S.FORM: anu muda'dac pabila'an paapukan kya amasamata ku tademaw hani pisula' han tu tu ngipen u palu' kapah satabuwan sasapihpih han u bucacing kapah satabu duduu'd u kilang nu da'dac kapah sacukedan nu luma'
S.PHON: anu muda Ē~ °da ¶ pabir~…ĺa Ē~ °an paapukan kja amasamata ku tad…ômaw ńßani pisur~…ĺa Ē~ ° ńßan tu tu Ňčip…ôn u par~…ĺu Ē~ ° kapańß satabuwan sasapińßpińß ńßan u bu ¶a ¶iŇč kapańß satabu duduu Ē~ °d u kir~…ĺaŇč nu da Ē~ °da ¶ kapańß sa ¶uk…ôdan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °
S.FORM: anu muda'dac pabila'an paapukan kya amasamata ku tademaw hani pisula' han tu tu ngipen u palu' kapah satabuwan sasapihpih han u bucacing kapah satabu duduu'd u kilang nu da'dac kapah sacukedan nu luma'
S.PHON: anu muda Ē~ °da ¶ pabir~…ĺa Ē~ °an paapukan kja amasamata ku tad…ômaw ńßani pisur~…ĺa Ē~ ° ńßan tu tu Ňčip…ôn u par~…ĺu Ē~ ° kapańß satabuwan sasapińßpińß ńßan u bu ¶a ¶iŇč kapańß satabu duduu Ē~ °d u kir~…ĺaŇč nu da Ē~ °da ¶ kapańß sa ¶uk…ôdan nu r~…ĺuma Ē~ °
